name: Zerodha Trading API — OWASP Input Validation
scenario: Zerodha's trading API has a mass assignment vulnerability (users can set their own account balance) and accepts unsanitized input. Fix with DTO pattern, Bean Validation, SQL injection prevention, and security headers.

core.description: OrderRequest record: @ValidTicker symbol, @Positive @Max(10000) quantity, @Size(max=500) description. Separate from JPA Entity (DTO pattern).
Custom @ValidTicker ConstraintValidator: checks against NSE symbol allowlist. Returns 'Invalid stock ticker symbol' on failure.
OrderController: @Valid @RequestBody + @PreAuthorize('hasRole(TRADER)'). @RestControllerAdvice exception handler returning 400 with field errors map.
FileSafetyService: getSafeReportPath(filename) — rejects '..' and '/', resolves against base dir, throws SecurityException if path escapes.
SecurityFilterChain: CSP header (default-src 'self'), X-Frame-Options DENY, HSTS.
@WebMvcTest+@SpringBootTest (4 tests): valid order→200, invalid symbol→400 with field error, no auth→401, path traversal throws SecurityException. All 4 pass.
README: OWASP A04 mass assignment explained with vulnerable vs safe code example.

bonus.description: XSSProtectionService: sanitizeHtml() using Jsoup Safelist.basic(). Test: <script> stripped, safe HTML preserved.
Add @Pattern to merchantId in PaymentRequest: only allow alphanumeric + dash. Test: invalid pattern → 400.
@SpringBootTest SQL injection test: verify JPA @Query with @Param returns empty list for SQL injection string input (not all records).

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. @Valid on @RequestBody: constraint violations throw MethodArgumentNotValidException — handle in @RestControllerAdvice. ConstraintValidator.isValid(): return true=valid, false=invalid — do NOT throw exception. @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown=true): silently ignore JSON fields not in DTO (mass assignment prevention). Path traversal check: Path.resolve(filename).normalize().startsWith(BASE_DIR) — always normalize before checking. @WebMvcTest: needs both the controller and the @RestControllerAdvice class listed to handle validation errors.
